title: Prism V3 Reading and Content Consumption Records
description: Schema for daily reading and content consumption session records in the Prism V3 experiment. Each entry captures one day of reading sessions, durations, and topic coverage.

date.description: Calendar date for this daily reading record (ISO 8601).

sessions.description: Individual reading or content consumption sessions during the day.

title.description: Title of the content consumed (article, book chapter, video, etc.).

duration_min.description: Duration of the reading/consumption session in minutes.

highlights.description: Number of highlights or bookmarks made during the session.

daily_reading_min.description: Total reading/consumption time for the day in minutes.

topics.description: Aggregated list of topic tags covered across all sessions for the day.
